consignor.motivation: Consignor "Bolon AB" with address in Ulricehamn, Sweden in the certificate is explicitly found in the invoice in seller and sender blocks with exact name and address, normalized per rules (4.1.0, 4.1.3.1). The country 'Sweden' matches exactly after normalization (4.1.4). No contradictions found.

goods_description.certificate_value:
1 Pallet 228 x 35 cm Grossweight 271 kg
1 Pallet 110 x 55 cm Grossweight 491 kg
Art nr 102739 Slate Artisan 200 cm
Art nr 106949 A4 sample
Art nr 103707 Illuminate Silence 50 x 50 cm
goods_description.motivation: Article numbers 102739, 106949, and 103707 in certificate are found exactly in invoice lines, and product descriptions match after normalization. Also, certificate references Invoice 148536 explicitly in remarks and item descriptions, activating the general goods description with invoice reference rule (4.3.5). Thus, goods description is verified with high confidence.

quantity.motivation: Quantities in certificate are expressed with units (lm, pcs) and match invoice values for corresponding article lines after normalization and decimal trunking (4.4.3.1, 4.4.2). Quantities 40 lm, 10 pcs and 480 pcs respectively found with corresponding values and units in invoice without contradiction.

origin.motivation: Origin country 'Sweden' in certificate matches Country of Origin 'SE' in invoice lines. EU origin normalization applies, recognizing 'Sweden' as an EU member state and matching 'SE' code in invoice (4.5.4.1, 4.5.4.2, 4.6). No contradictions found.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: Alla kritiska kontrollpunkter har verifierats med tydlig textmatchning eller tillåten normalisering utan avvikelser eller motsägelser.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla uppgifter i certifikatet finns tydligt och korrekt verifierade i fakturan. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt utan vidare manuell granskning.
